$schema_doc: Registry of knowledge-base groups. Hooks/skills/agents should read this instead of hardcoding paths. Sibling of project-map.json.

$fields.name: kebab-case slug; stable identifier
$fields.root: absolute path or URL; the canonical entry point
$fields.backed_by: persistence/sync story (git remotes, db, ephemeral, stowed-from)
$fields.subpaths: optional named subpaths under root (e.g. lessons, plans, evals)
$fields.consumed_by: optional list of skills/hooks/CLAUDE.md sections that read this
$fields.write_via: optional preferred skill/CLI for writes (decouples callers from impl)

groups.name: notes
groups.describe: Personal shell+nvim notes: journal, inbox, knowledge, self, employment

groups.name: agent-runtime
groups.describe: Agent runtime state: plans, lessons, evals, benchmarks, monitoring

groups.name: lab
groups.describe: Incubator for briefs, brainstorm, ideas; pre-canonical artifacts before they graduate to ~/dev/{project}/

groups.name: claude-config
groups.describe: Claude harness config: workflow rules, skills, per-project auto-memory, plans staging
groups.backed_by: partially stowed from ~/.dotfiles (skills, CLAUDE.md); projects/ and plans/ are local-only

groups.name: dotfiles
groups.describe: Source-of-truth for stowed configs, shared hooks, skills, rulesync

groups.name: dev-repos
groups.describe: Working tree for project repos; canonical READMEs/runbooks/ADRs live here per project
groups.backed_by: git: per-repo remotes (mix of forgejo + github)

groups.name: mem0
groups.describe: Self-hosted mem0 for user-level prefs and cross-project facts
groups.backed_by: mem0 self-hosted on home-k3s; postgres + qdrant backing store

groups.name: forgejo
groups.describe: Self-hosted Forgejo: primary remote for ~/.notes, home-config, and other personal repos
groups.backed_by: Forgejo on home-k3s; backed up via scheduled job (see home-config/apps/forgejo/)
